bookmarkTooltipElsewhere: Bookmark on “{section}”. Tap to bookmark this section instead.
confirmDiscardUnsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes in this lesson. Exit anyway?
confirmUnsavedLessonCloseBody: You have unsaved changes in this lesson.
confirmLeaveActiveExam: Leave the exam? You will lose progress on this attempt.
confirmLeaveActiveQuiz: Leave the quiz? You will lose progress on this attempt.
lessonGameReadyInfoNoneSection: This syllabus section has no questionnaire yet. Insert one with the Quiz button in the editor toolbar.
lessonGameReadyInfoOff: Complete the questionnaire block (concept, definition, and correct answer) to enable static Arcade games.
lessonGameReadyInfoOffSection: Complete this section's questionnaire (concept, definition, and correct answer) to enable static Arcade games.
lessonGameReadyInfoOn: This lesson has a complete questionnaire and can power Arcade games in static mode (no AI).
lessonGameReadyInfoOnSection: This section has a complete questionnaire and can power static Arcade games (no AI).
lessonHeaderEditMeta: Edit lesson name, icon, and description
lessonQuizDesc: Game-ready questionnaire. Fill all fields for static mode.
lessonSectionsIncomplete: Mark every section of the outline before completing the lesson.
lessonTocAddSectionHint: Adds a large outline step in the lesson menu (below the part you are on).
lessonTocAddSubsectionHint: Adds a smaller step inside that part (indented in the lesson menu).
lessonTocDragNestHint: Drag right/left to change nest level (watch the line)
lessonTocDragReorder: Drag to reorder; right/left changes depth
lessonTocDropGutterNest: Drag right/left to change nest level (watch the line)
lessonTocEditHint: Edit and tap outside to save
lessonTocNewSectionStarter: Write the content for this part here.
lessonTocNewSubsectionStarter: Write the content for this sub-step here.
lessonTocRemoveBlocked: At least one section must remain.
lessonTocMoveBlocked: That section move is not available (quiz rows, nesting limits, or filter).
lessonTocFlushBlocked: Could not apply the outline change: save or refocus the editor and try again.
lessonSaveFlushBlocked: Could not save: the editor did not sync this section. Tap the text again and retry.
lessonTocRemoveQuizSectionBody: This section includes a quiz. Delete the section and its quiz?
lessonTocTapSectionHint: Tap the title to jump to this part of the lesson
mochilaCareAllClear: All caught up. Keep studying to earn lumens ☀️
progressBackpackTagline: Your progress in this knowledge tree
examCompleteAllQuizzes: Answer every exam quiz before viewing the final evaluation.
examQuizAwaitStart: Tap «Start exam» below to begin the questionnaire.
quizBlockIncompleteHint: The author hasn't finished this questionnaire yet.
lessonSaveQuizIncomplete: Can't save yet: finish every questionnaire (or remove it). Each one needs a playable question for learners.
examFailed: You did not pass the exam
quizStepsHint: Tap each step from first to last. Tap a chosen step to undo.
quizStepsPromptGeneric: Put the steps in the correct order.
quizV2RandomIntro: Each attempt picks a random challenge type.
quizWizardClozeHint: Tap words to hide in cloze mode.
quizWizardFieldQuestionClozeNote: Leave empty for cloze mode. Filling it disables cloze.
quizWizardFieldAnswerPh: The answer they should get right
quizWizardStepHelpCloze: Fill the blanks in the definition.
quizWizardStepHelpMultiple: Pick the correct answer among traps.
quizWizardStepHelpChips: Tap the right chips to build the answer.
quizWizardStepHelpSteps: Put the steps in the right order.
quizPassRateHint: You need at least {percent}% to earn lumens.
examTocLocked: Start the evaluation to unlock the syllabus
examTocSequential: Complete each section in order to advance
